steps.title: Use the cross-border effect
steps.content: The text explains that ecosystems extend across the US-Mexico border, so actions on one side can affect the other. That makes international cooperation essential for environmental management.

steps.title: Reject unrelated verbs
steps.content: Choice B means approves of, Choice C means documents, and Choice D means recommends. None expresses the necessity created by shared ecosystems. The needed word means that coordination is necessary. The answer is A.
